Settings

          
        

        

          

            
Appearance

            

              
Theme

              

                
                
                
                
                
                
                
                
                
              

            

            

              
Window frame

              
              
Applies the next time the window is closed and reopened.

            

          


          

            
Product

            

              
              
Off = monitor only (no Discord / scheduler / Ollama startup). Restart after changing.

              
              

                
                
              

              

            

          


          

            
Credentials

            

              
Discord bot

              
—

              
              

                
                
                
              

              
Saving connects right away. Restart to disconnect after clearing. Logs include Discord and app output.

            

            

              
Perplexity API key

              
—

              
              

                
                
              

              
Get a key at perplexity.ai/settings/api. Stored in Keychain.
